---
theme-settings:
  theme: default
  barposition: top

survey-settings:
  mode: preview
  show-previous: true
  use-cookies: true
  auto-scroll: false
  rate-survey: false
  system-language: en
  highlight-unanswered: true
  highlight-color: blue
  capture-metadata: true
  all-required: false
---

```{r}
library(surveydown)
```

--- page1

# Restoration Test - Page 1

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc',
  id    = 'fruit',
  label = "Favorite fruit?",
  option = c(
    'Apple'  = 'apple',
    'Banana' = 'banana',
    'Cherry' = 'cherry'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'text',
  id    = 'name',
  label = "Your name?"
)

# Multi-value questions: their answers are stored pipe-joined, so this
# exercises that restoration re-splits on the pipe (not the comma)
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc_multiple',
  id    = 'colors',
  label = "Favorite colors?",
  option = c('Red' = 'red', 'Blue' = 'blue', 'Green' = 'green')
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'mc_multiple_buttons',
  id    = 'drinks',
  label = "Favorite drinks?",
  option = c('Coffee' = 'coffee', 'Tea' = 'tea', 'Juice' = 'juice')
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'daterange',
  id    = 'trip',
  label = "Trip dates?"
)

sd_question(
  type    = 'slider_numeric',
  id      = 'budget',
  label   = "Budget range (0-10)?",
  option  = seq(0, 10, 1),
  default = c(3, 7)
)
```

--- page2

# Restoration Test - Page 2

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'numeric',
  id    = 'age',
  label = "Your age?"
)

# A matrix question on a page we navigate to twice. Matrix parent questions
# have no input of their own (NA in all_data), so revisiting this page used
# to crash navigation via a non-NA-safe restoration guard.
sd_question(
  type  = 'matrix',
  id    = 'rating',
  label = "Rate these:",
  row   = c('Speed' = 'speed', 'Price' = 'price'),
  option = c('Low' = 'low', 'High' = 'high')
)
```

--- end

## End of the restoration test survey.

```{r}
sd_close()
```
